name: Insufficiently Protected Credentials
description: The product transmits or stores authentication credentials using methods that are insufficient to protect them from unauthorized interception or retrieval, such as plaintext storage, weak encoding, or unencrypted transmission.
detection_pattern: Credential data (passwords, API keys, tokens) flows from INGRESS or TRANSFORM nodes to STORAGE nodes (config files, databases, registry) or EGRESS[network] nodes without passing through a TRANSFORM[strong_hash|encryption] node that applies cryptographic protection (bcrypt, Argon2, AES, TLS)
